name: Low-Calorie French Fries
recipeInstructions:
1. Use 2 unpeeled and scrubbed potatoes, cut to baking size.
2. Cut potatoes in half lengthwise. Slice each half into lengthwise wedges with some peel on each piece.
3. Soak in cold water for 20 minutes. Drain and dry the potatoes.
4. Spray a cookie sheet with cooking spray.
5. Place potatoes into a plastic bag or large plastic bowl with a tight-fitting lid. Add oil and shake to coat the potatoes.
6. Arrange potatoes in a single layer on the cooking sheet.
7. Bake in a preheated 450-degree oven for about 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
8. To season, sprinkle with salt, pepper, and your choice of paprika or celery salt. Reduce salt if using celery salt.
9. Also good to sprinkle with chili powder just before the end of cooking time.
